div.style: width:80px; height:80px; border-radius:16px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5468FF,#7B68EE); margin:0 auto 20px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;

p.style: color:#9ea3b0; font-size:14px; line-height:1.7; max-width:560px; margin:0 auto 28px;

div.p: VDConnect bridges Splunk with vector databases, enabling you to collect, index, and search log data stored inside Milvus, Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, Qdrant, and pgvector.

span.style: background:rgba(0,161,234,0.12); color:#00A1EA; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
background:rgba(84,104,255,0.12); color:#5468FF; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
background:rgba(45,222,152,0.12); color:#2DDE98; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
background:rgba(255,107,53,0.12); color:#FF6B35; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
background:rgba(220,56,44,0.12); color:#DC382C; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
background:rgba(51,103,145,0.12); color:#336791; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;

div.style: background:#1a1d23; border:1px solid #2a2d35; border-radius:10px; padding:20px; text-align:left; max-width:500px; margin:0 auto;
